doc_title: Waters of the United States — EPA/Army Corps Final Rule
label: partial
reason: The document inaccurately conflates the text of the January 2023 Final Rule with the "continuous surface connection" standard established by the Supreme Court’s later *Sackett v. EPA* decision.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 90
REASON: While it accurately references the January 2023 Rule (88 FR 3004), the document incorrectly implies the rule itself contains the "continuous surface connection" test from *Sackett v. EPA*, which was actually a subsequent judicial narrowing of the agency's definitions.

REASON: The document inaccurately conflates the text of the January 2023 Final Rule with the "continuous surface connection" standard established by the Supreme Court’s later *Sackett v. EPA* decision.
